steps.title: Compare the coefficients
steps.content: Form ratios of the matching $x$, $y$, and constant terms in $$-16x + 20y = 48$$ and $$-8x + 10y = -24$$. This gives $\frac{-16}{-8}=\frac{20}{10}=2$ but $\frac{48}{-24}=-2$.

steps.title: Identify the answer
steps.content: The $x$,$y$ ratios match but the constant ratio differs — the lines are parallel and never meet, so zero solutions. That confirms D is correct.
